figures.caption: Fig. 5. Seven-month field-deployment time series across 64 nodes. Top: mean daily energy consumption (mWh/day), stable at 1.638±0.022mWh/day. Bottom: mean classification accuracy with adaptation enabled (solid) and disabled (dashed), illustrating the 1.4 pp recovery delivered by the local plasticity rule by Month 7.
TABLE X MONTHLY FIELD TELEMETRY: ENERGY, LIFETIME, AND DRIFT ADAPTATION (64 NODES)
